content.en:
A period of time.

The fourth path really spread, and some of the Origin Upper Realm Overlords began to study it.

As a result, one by one, the study failed, and the body was injured.

Of course, this is a very normal thing, even if any path is thoroughly studied, it is extremely difficult to break through and succeed, not to mention that the fourth path is so difficult.

......

Ancient Heavenly Palace.

A deep void.

The Desolate Blood Ancestor came here and urged the magic circle here.

Soon.

A terrifying aura seemed to leak out little by little from the depths of endless time and space.

In an instant, the aura that far surpassed the Desolate Blood Ancestor permeated out.

"Ancestor!"

The Desolate Blood Ancestor said respectfully.

Wow!

A shirtless young man walked out.

"Wild blood, you are bothering me, is the Ancient Heavenly Palace in crisis?"

This young man is the founder of the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace, the Desolate Ancestor, the ancestor of the Desolate Blood Ancestor, and an ancient being who has completed the eight awakenings of the Origin Ancestor on the other side, and has been sleeping for countless primeval eras.

The last time I woke up, it was 7.1 billion years ago.

"Ancestor, the fourth path has appeared!" said the Desolate Blood Ancestor.

After the desolate ancestor reached the eighth awakening, he almost reached the limit, and if he wanted to break through, he couldn't do it.

Therefore, the Wild Ancestor has always wanted to study other paths, but his own research was unsuccessful, so he fell asleep and waited for the younger generations to study it.

Now, Ye Tian has researched it, and the Desolate Blood Ancestor has naturally come to inform the Desolate Ancestor.

"What, the fourth way appeared, so quickly?"

Arazu was amazed.

The last time he woke up, he hadn't studied a trace yet, so he had studied it so quickly?

There are so many Origin Upper Realm overlords, how can they be researched so quickly, this is not normal!

The Desolate Blood Ancestor said: "It is a Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has researched it by himself, which is very strange, but the other party is indeed breaking through with the fourth path, and at the same time, the Origin Ancestor of the other side, the Origin of the Other Shore, and the will of the Origin Realm are sublimated and broken through, breaking through in all directions, and the strength is terrifying, as soon as it breaks through, it has the combat power of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord comparable to the four awakenings!"

"What about the legacy?"

The Arazu only cared about this issue.

Then.

The Desolate Blood Ancestor took out a inheritance, and he did not accept the inheritance, but after bidding for it, he handed it over to the Desolate Ancestor.

But to accept the lineage, you have to make a vow, otherwise you can't accept the lineage.

The Wild Ancestor took over the inheritance and quickly made an oath, and only then did he receive the inheritance.

After a long time, the desolate ancestor sighed with emotion: "It's too perfect, the other party should be the reincarnation Haotian body method breakthrough, this is the supreme other shore origin ancestor body method! This way of breaking through is more difficult, but the other party can still walk out of the fourth path, it's incredible!"

"However, we can't directly use this method to take the fourth path, we must create our own method that conforms to our own Origin Ancestral Body Method, so that we can maintain the balance and then use the three-source secret medicine recorded above to break through!"

But soon, the desolate ancestor lamented: "It's a pity, I have already completed the eight awakenings, let me give up the eight awakenings, if I rebuild, the price paid is too great, but when the time comes, I can learn from the fourth path and find a way to temporarily complete the balance, so that the other side of the body origin can be re-cultivated, and then absorbed by the other side of the origin ancestor, so as to impact the ninth awakening, this is also a path." "

"The Ninth Awakening!"

The Desolate Blood Ancestor is also looking forward to it.

He didn't know whether there was an existence of the ninth awakening in the land of eternity, but once he became the existence of the ninth awakening, he would be truly invincible.

"Wild blood, I'll go to retreat and study, if I research more things, I'll pass it on to you when the time comes!" said Wild Ancestor.

"Yes!"

The Wild Blood Ancestor replied.

......

In the years that followed, more than one ancient being woke up, but even if it did, it was only to study the fourth path, and there were no other moves, and even the outside world didn't know about it.

Ye Tian slowly cultivated, using many resources to improve his cultivation.

He's just broken through, and according to his own setup, it's the first balance, and he wants to hit the second balance as well.

But in this process, he had to improve his Origin on the other side, refine his physical body, and enhance his Origin Realm will, and only after he had reached the current limit could he be qualified to impact the second balance.

And this process must be very long, and it is not so fast to ascend.

Fortunately, he is not in a hurry, he has a lot of resources now, and he can improve slowly.

Other than that.

Ye Tian is also creating more top-notch supreme techniques, so that he can feel more in the reincarnation golden text, even if he can't improve his strength, he has to increase his foundation!

The years passed.

Before you know it, 10 million primeval years have passed.

For such a long time, Ye Tian's strength has improved limitedly, but it has made the strength of Fengya Island and the human race skyrocket.

Now.

Wind Tooth Island has given birth to two more Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, the Lord of the White Capital and another Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

It can be said that Wind Tooth Island now has seven Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and its strength is already very strong.

And the human race has not yet given birth to a second Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, but it has given birth to many Origin Lower Realm Heavenly Ancestors and Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

For example, Ye Tian's son, Ye Xingchen, is now the Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and he is also the top one, very close to the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

Now, Ye Xingchen is accumulating strength, and when the time comes, he can attack the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

All of this is naturally the credit of Ye Tian, if it weren't for him, Fengya Island and the human race would not have grown so fast.

......

Ruins of Shadows.

Ye Tian came here, and he was ready to completely deal with the Shadow Ruins.

In the past, his strength was not good, so he gave up destroying the Shadow Ruins, and later he was bent on improving his strength, and he didn't bother to come out of the Shadow Ruins.

But now, his strength is in a very slow period of improvement, and he is ready to take the time to destroy the Shadow Ruins.

However, after he came to the Shadow Ruins, he found that the remaining Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Shadow Ruins had taken the other Origin Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors to another place in the Shadow Ruins, and combined with some other Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors to form a force.

This force is not called Shadow Ruins, but Shadow Alliance.

The three Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors including the Lord of the Shadow Circle are all members, and the Shadow Alliance has thirteen Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, but there is no Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and the strength is not strong.

Swish!

Ye Tian quickly went to the Shadow Alliance, preparing to find out the Lord of the Shadow Realm, and then kill them, and then kill the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Shadow Ruins, and then leave the Shadow Ruins.
